videos.headline: Heinrich Haarberg rumbles into end zone for Nebraska TD
videos.description: Heinrich Haarberg caps off Nebraska's opening drive with a 5-yard rushing score to take an early lead vs. Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Heinrich Haarberg rumbles into end zone for Nebraska TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryson Green evens score for Wisconsin with 4-yard TD
videos.description: Wisconsin's Braedyn Locke goes top shelf and zips a four-yard touchdown pass to Bryson Green to even things up against Nebraska.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryson Green evens score for Wisconsin with 4-yard TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dante Dowdell finds open seam for 12-yard Nebraska score
videos.description: Nebraska's Dante Dowdell bolts up the middle and crosses the goal line for a rushing touchdown against Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dante Dowdell finds open seam for 12-yard Nebraska score) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jahmal Banks toe taps for impressive Nebraska TD
videos.description: Jahmal Banks reels in a tough snag and manages to keep one foot inbounds for a Nebraska touchdown against Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jahmal Banks toe taps for impressive Nebraska TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Touchdown! Dante Dowdell scores vs. Wisconsin
videos.description: Touchdown! Dante Dowdell scores vs. Wisconsin
